metadata.description: Orases curated Claude Code plugins for session analysis, business process visualization, and documentation management

plugins.name: workflow-analyzer
plugins.description: Advanced workflow analysis and optimization tools for Claude Code. Analyzes development patterns, tracks session transcripts, and provides intelligent recommendations.

plugins.name: ba-toolkit
plugins.description: A Claude Code skill that transforms written workflow steps into interactive, browser-based visual process flow diagrams with clickable elements.

plugins.name: docs-management
plugins.description: Documentation management plugin with Diataxis framework support. Create, organize, and maintain project documentation following industry standards with compressed CLAUDE.md index generation.

plugins.name: tldv-notes
plugins.description: Create Confluence pages from TLDV meeting recordings. Processes meetings and generates structured notes with summaries, action items, and discussion topics.

plugins.name: work-summary
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive work summaries from git branch changes and posts them as structured Jira comments. Produces client-friendly and technical summaries for stakeholder visibility.
